notes: MYOB Zendesk help center hard-blocks automated access: the Announcements category, its .atom feed, the help-center articles.atom feed, and the help-center root all return HTTP 403 (curl + WebFetch). No RSS/Atom feed resolves and the HTML page cannot be scraped. No posts retrievable.
